name: ABDOMINAL LYMPHADENOPATHY
definition: superior portion of lesser omentum suspending stomach from liver in porta hepatis extending down hepatoduodenal ligament, anterior + posterior to portal between duodenal sweep + pancreatic head anterior to IVC in splenic hilum periaortic, pericaval, interaortocaval preaortic nodes along ileocolic artery along common, external + internal iliac vessels ENLARGED LYMPH NODE WITH LOW-DENSITY CENTER
